name: Arribatec Solutions ASA
summary: Arribatec Solutions ASA, a software and consulting company, provides digital business solutions in Norway and internationally. Its solutions include Unit4 that provides services for driving digitalization in platforms to deliver digital experiences; xledger, a cloud based ERP system; Hypergene that provides enterprise performance management services ; 4human, a software as a solution that delivers HRM solutions to corporate business, government and public services, retail, education, museums, construction, and other sectors; Power BI, a collection of tools and services that facilitates the acquisition of data, data modeling, visualizations, and reports, as well as the distribution of analytical solutions; RamBase, cloud based ERP solution for manufacturing and wholesale industries; Arribatec Instipro3, a research platform; and Arribatec Certify, an application for daily management of housekeeping department, including digitalized cleanliness, as well as inspection processes for rooms, and public and exhibition areas. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
